title: ServiceAccount row shape — platform-admin projection samples
description: Illustrative platform-admin surface projections. Every field marked `[NEVER RETURNED]` is stripped at the serialization layer regardless of the caller's permissions. Real values are ULIDs / timestamps / kid identifiers — the sample fixes the shape.

example_platform_scoped.note: A platform-plane SA (tenant_id IS NULL). Used for cross-tenant integrations — fleet observability collector, sync worker, health-probe agent.
example_platform_scoped.name: observability-collector
example_platform_scoped.description: Fleet-wide observability collector — ingests OpenTelemetry from every tenant's sports-service pods.

example_tenant_scoped.note: A tenant-scoped SA (tenant_id populated). Typical use: webhook signer for a specific tenant's Braintree integration.
example_tenant_scoped.name: webhook-signer-braintree
example_tenant_scoped.description: Braintree webhook payload signer for Acme Corp's payments integration.

example_expiring_soon.note: SA inside the rotation-due warning window (14 days). `is_expiring_soon = true`. NotifyRotationDueJob has dispatched a reminder.
example_expiring_soon.name: cross-service-audit-sync
example_expiring_soon.description: Sync worker copying audit rows to the cold-storage archive.

example_dormant.note: SA whose last_used_at is > 30 days old. DetectDormantServiceAccountJob has flagged. Operators should confirm the SA is still needed OR disable.
example_dormant.name: legacy-migration-worker
example_dormant.description: One-shot migration worker — remnant of a February migration campaign.

example_disabled.note: SA that has been soft-disabled. status = 'disabled' regardless of expires_at. Existing JWTs signed before disable are STILL valid until natural exp; the disable prevents new token-exchange.
example_disabled.name: webhook-signer-stripe
example_disabled.description: Stripe webhook signer — disabled during payment-processor migration.

example_expired.note: SA past expires_at + grace period. PurgeExpiredServiceAccountsJob has soft-disabled + fired ServiceAccountExpired. Response shape shows the disabled + expired combination.
example_expired.name: orphaned-etl-worker
example_expired.description: ETL worker that ops forgot to rotate.

example_creation_response.note: Response body of POST /platform/service-accounts. The `secret` field is present ONLY in this response — subsequent reads NEVER return it. Include the plaintext exchange secret; storage-through-Doppler is the expected caller pattern.

never_projected_fields: The plaintext exchange secret except at creation + rotation response (returned ONCE, never re-retrievable)
The JWT signing key material referenced by signer_kid (owned by auth::jwt_signing_keys; never surfaced on any SA endpoint)
